summary: Verified AIService migration: All pages (Settings, CharacterCreate, StoryboardCreate, ThumbnailCreate) load without JS errors. Backend tests 20/20 passed. Settings provider toggle, API key input, model selectors, and save all work correctly.

minor.issue: Model 'deepseek-chat' not recognized by kie.ai API - may need correct model name from kie.ai docs

action_items: Verify correct kie.ai text model name (deepseek-chat may not be supported, check kie.ai API docs for supported models)
critical_code_review_comments: AIService migration from GeminiService is complete and working
All pages correctly import and use AIService
Settings page correctly saves provider settings to backend and localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: AIService migration verified. All pages use AIService correctly. Settings saves to backend. kie.ai image generation works (gpt-image-1 model). kie.ai text generation returns model name error for deepseek-chat - may need correct model name.

settings_page: When kie.ai selected: shows kie.ai API key field, DeepSeek Chat, GPT-Image-1 models
Save button persists settings to backend with success message
All data-testid attributes present and working
